description: This file is a Bash script that sets up and seeds a PostgreSQL database schema for an insurance fraud detection system. It creates tables, indexes, functions, triggers, and inserts seed data for claims and fraud signals.
calls: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.claims
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.fraud_signals
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_claims_risk_level
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_claims_status
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_claims_created_at
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fraud_signals_claim_id
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_fraud_signals_severity
